name: Doc Q (Reprint)
effect_text: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: If your Leader has the "Blackbeard Pirates" type, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 1 or less.[On K.O.] Draw 1 card.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set.
